hooks.prompt: At the start of this session, read the file at ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/context/about_me.md. If it contains '[Your Name]' (placeholder not yet filled in), this is a first-time install — immediately greet the user and begin the onboarding workflow from ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/commands/onboarding.md without waiting for them to say anything. If about_me.md is filled in, this is a returning user — read all context files in ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/context/ and confirm you are ready to help.
